data.title: Verizon Communications Insider Sold Shares Worth $261,623, According to a Recent SEC Filing
data.description:
Kyle Malady, Executive Vice President and Group CEO of Verizon Business, on February 04, 2025, sold 6,590 shares in Verizon Communications for $261,623. Following the Form 4 filing with the SEC, Malady has control over a total of 18,415 common shares of the company, with 18,415 controlled indirectly.

SEC Filing:

data.title: Individual investors have been on a record-setting buying streak - and they are loving the Magnificent Seven
data.description:
By Joseph Adinolfi

Individual investors have scooped up shares of Tesla and Nvidia while selling the rip in Meta, data from J.P. Morgan show

Retail investors have been remarkably active in the stock market lately, according to a team of strategists at J.P. Morgan.

The vaunted Magnificent Seven tech stocks have struggled as a group since the start of 2025, and retail traders have stepped up to aggressively buy the dip.

This has been the highlight of a record-setting surge in retail-trading activity highlighted by J.P. Morgan in a report shared with clients on Wednesday.

Retail traders bought $3.2 billion in shares of individual stocks on a net basis earlier on Tuesday, the report said. Shares of Magnificent Seven members accounted for about 70% of this activity.

By J.P. Morgan's count, that brought their buying spree to $12 billion worth of cash equities over the past week. Single stocks accounted for $8.6 billion of this, the largest weekly tally on record.

Their favorites during this period included Tesla Inc. (TSLA) and Nvidia Corp. (NVDA), which have struggled since the start of 2025. Traders also chased shares of Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) and Oklo Inc. (OKLO) higher, the J.P. Morgan team said.

At the same time, these traders aggressively sold shares of Meta Platforms Inc. (META), taking advantage of the stock's monster gains. Meta shares have rocketed higher recently, gaining more than 17% during a 13-day winning streak through Wednesday that has been the stock's longest on record, Traders have also slightly trimmed their holdings in Apple Inc. (AAPL).

While retail traders have been buying, institutional investors have been selling.

According to the J.P. Morgan team, periods of aggressive retail buying have in the past frequently signaled more short-term gains ahead for the U.S. equity market.

J.P. Morgan isn't the only Wall Street institution to highlight retail traders' dip-buying antics. Goldman Sachs Group's Scott Rubner also noted that retail traders have been pushing around their better-capitalized institutional peers lately, as MarketWatch reported earlier.

See: A retail army is bullying bigger investors waiting to buy a stock-market dip, says Goldman strategist

-Joseph Adinolfi

This content was created by MarketWatch, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. MarketWatch is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal.

data.title: Kontron, Telekom Slovenije set up 5G network at Cinkarna Celje
data.description:
LJUBLJANA (Slovenia), February 6 (SeeNews) - Slovenian information and communication solutions provider Kontron d.o.o., part of German Internet of Things (IoT) group Kontron, said on Thursday it has set up a private 5G network for local chemicals producer Cinkarna Celje [LJE:CICG] in cooperation with Telekom Slovenije [LJE:TLSG].

"It is the first network in the region based on "standalone" (SA) 5G technology and enables the use of new applications, services and solutions for the digitization of business," Kontron d.o.o. said in a press release, without disclosing the value of the project.

The project has enabled digitisation of warehouse operations with portable mobile terminals at the Celje production location, in eastern Slovenia, including seven warehouses, in a move to optimise its operations.

Kontron's solution provides software and hardware for the implementation of SA's 5G core network, while Telekom Slovenije provides powerful, reliable and secure connectivity via the 5G radio access network (RAN Radio Access Network), as per the statement.

Cinkarna Celje employs some 720 people. The Kontron's solution enables material tracking with barcode readers and sensor integration with direct connectivity to the 5G network in warehouses. In the future, the private mobile network will also be used as a platform for the digitization of other business segments.

Shares of Cinkarna Celje gained 2.46% to 29.20 euro ($30.26) on the Ljubljana bourse on Thursday, while Telekom Slovenije’s shares closed flat at 86.50 euro.

($ = 0.965 euro)

data.title: Paysafe Mulling Sale After Receiving Takeover Interest, Bloomberg Reports
Crossject Issues Second Tranche of Convertible Bonds to Heights Capital
data.description:
Crossject completed the issuance of a second tranche of convertible bonds totaling 2.5 million euros to Heights Capital as part of a financing agreement.

The French specialty pharmaceutical company said Thursday the second tranche comprises 32 convertible bonds carrying a 7% interest rate per annum and maturing Dec. 28, 2027.

Proceeds will be used for the development of epileptic rescue therapy Zepizure, ongoing investments in manufacturing centers, other research and development projects, and to cover general and administrative expenses.

data.title: Chile's Cochilco expects copper price to be $4.25/lb through 2026
data.description:
Chile's state copper commission Cochilco held its copper price forecast for 2025 steady at $4.25 per pound and also used the same price for its new 2026 projection, the agency said on Thursday.

Cochiloc raised its 2025 price to $4.25 from $3.85 last May and has kept the projection steady ever since. It said it expects copper prices to remain above $4.00 over the next decade.

"These projections are supported by a rise in copper demand from the energy transition, electricity grids and a limited supply," Claudia Rodriguez, Cochilco's interim VP, said in a statement, adding that geopolitical tensions also played a role.

"Uncertainty about China's economic recovery, tariffs implemented by the United States and the hardening of monetary policy could limit the demand for copper, affecting its price," Rodriguez said.

Cochilco expects the global copper deficit to be 118,000 metric tons this year with a surplus of 210,000 tons through to next year.

It also expects Chile's copper production to rise by 4.6% this year to 5.76 million tons and grow another 3.6% to 5.97 million tons in 2026.

data.title: Acconeer Signs Franchise Deal With Future Electronics
data.description:
Acconeer signed a global franchise agreement for its radar sensors and related products with Canada-based electronic components distributor, Future Electronics.

The distribution deal includes the Swedish radar technology company's patented Pulsed Coherent Radar systems and 60-gigahertz millimeter-wave A121 radar, according to a Thursday release.

Reporter NameMalady Kyle
RelationshipEVP and Group CEO-VZ Business
TypeSell
Amount$261,623
SEC FilingForm 4

Kyle Malady, EVP and Group CEO-VZ Business at Verizon Communications, sold 6,590 shares of common stock on February 4, 2025, at a price of $39.7 per share, totaling $261,623. Following the transaction, Malady no longer directly owns any common stock in the company but retains indirect ownership of 18,415 shares through a 401(k).

SEC Filing: VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC [ VZ ] - Form 4 - Feb. 06, 2025

data.title: Goldgroup Announces Successful Accelerated Warrant Exercise
data.description:
(TheNewswire)

    Vancouver, British Columbia –TheNewswire - February 6, 2025 -Goldgroup Mining Inc. (“Goldgroup” or the “Company”)(TSX-V:GGA, OTC:GGAZF) is pleased to announce that all shareholdersholding share purchase warrants (collectively, the “Warrants”) issuedpursuant to financings completed on September26, 2024 and November 18, 2024 (the "Financings")have exercised or, having informed the Company are in the process ofexercising, all the outstanding Warrants.  A total of 18,681,818Warrants were exercisable at C$0.10 per common share and upon exerciseof the Warrants, the Company will receive gross proceeds ofapproximately $1,868,182.

    The Company gave notice to the holders of the Warrantsby press release that an Acceleration Event had occurred during theterm of the Warrants and the expiry date of the Warrants was therebyaccelerated to thirty (30) days after the date of the notice,resulting in a new expiry date of February 9, 2025.

    The Company is using the proceeds to:

    • Finalize the purchase and installation of crushing andloading equipment that will complete its expansion plans to increasemineralized crusher throughput to over 4,500 tonnes per day depositedon leach pads and thereby markedly increasing gold production,targeting annual production of 25,000+ ounces (approximately 8,650ounces produced at the mine in 2024).  

    • Initiate a diamond drilling program on the NuevaEsperanza and Reyna zones which are contiguous to the current open pitmining operations to add resources to the mine plan and thereby extendthe Life of Mine. 

    • Conduct surface exploration including geophysics,trenching, sampling and soil geochemical surveying in newly outlinedmineralized Cata and Coati zones projected to be the southernextension of the major throughgoing Cerro Prieto shear zone, exposedagain by trenching approximately 800 meters SSE of the leach pads. 

    The Company anticipates that the crushing circuitexpansion installation work will be completed over the coming sixweeks and thereafter be operational to meet production expansionexpectations.

    THIS PRESS RELEASE, PROVIDED PURSUANT TO APPLICABLECANADIAN REQUIREMENTS, IS NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION TO UNITED STATES NEWSSERVICES OR FOR DISSEMINATION IN THE UNITED STATES, AND DOES NOTCONSTITUTE AN OFFER OF THE SECURITIES DESCRIBED HEREIN. THE OFFERINGIN QUESTION HAS NOT BEEN REGISTERED UNDER THE UNITED STATES SECURITIESACT OF 1933, AS AMENDED, OR ANY STATE SECURITIES LAWS, AND THESECURITIES SOLD IN SUCH OFFERING MAY NOT BE OFFERED OR SOLD IN THEUNITED STATES OR TO U.S. PERSONS ABSENT REGISTRATION OR APPLICABLEEXEMPTION FROM REGISTRATION REQUIREMENTS.

    AboutGoldgroup

    Goldgroup is a Canadian-based mining Company that ownsand operates the Cerro Prieto heap-leach gold mine located in theState of Sonora, Mexico and is led by a team of highly successful andseasoned individuals with extensive expertise in mine development,corporate finance, and exploration in Mexico.

    For further information on Goldgroup, pleasevisit www.goldgroupmining.com

    On behalf of the Boardof Directors

    Ralph Shearing

    CEO

Suchsecurities have not been, and will not be, registered under the UnitedStates Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “U.S. SecuritiesAct”), or any state securities laws, and, accordingly, may not beoffered or sold within the United States, or to or for the account orbenefit of persons in the United States or “U.S. Persons”, as suchterm is defined in Regulation S promulgated under the U.S. SecuritiesAct, unless registered under the U.S. Securities Act and applicablestate securities laws or pursuant to an exemption from suchregistration requirements.

data.title: Serco Bags U.K. Ministry of Defence Contract Valued $1.25 Billion
data.description:
By Cristina Gallardo

Government services provider Serco will assist the U.K. Ministry of Defence in recruiting military officials, under a contract valued at 1 billion pounds ($1.25 billion).

The London-listed group said Thursday that the contract spans seven years, but the MoD could opt to extend it for a further three years maximum, in which case its value would reach 1.5 billion pounds.

Under the deal, Serco would help the ministry recruit officials for the Royal Navy, the British Army, the Royal Air Force and Strategic Command. It will be the first time that recruitment for all four branches is brought together, it said.

The U.K. is expected to launch a mobilization campaign in April, lasting 21 months, Serco said. Its new service to the MoD will kick off in early 2027, it added.

Write to Cristina Gallardo at cristina.gallardo@wsj.com

data.title: Equifax reports Q4 revenue below estimates on slower hiring, shares fall
data.description:
Credit ratings firm Equifax's fourth-quarter revenue fell short of estimates, hurt by a weaker hiring market and slower-than-expected mortgage growth as interest rates remain elevated, sending shares down over 6.5% on Thursday.

The Atlanta, Georgia-based company's revenue rose 7%, powered by a 29% jump in U.S. mortgage revenue, but missed analysts' estimate of $1.44 billion, according to data compiled by LSEG.

Revenue from its workforce solutions unit, the company's largest operating segment, increased by 7% to reach $598.1 million.

The company, however, flagged weakness in the unit, which vets potential employees for businesses, due to a slower hiring market in the U.S.

Demand for mortgages influences results at Equifax, which relies on providing credit reports and verification services.

Although the Federal Reserve's cut of 100 basis points has provided some relief, possible future cuts have led many potential homebuyers to wait for a more favorable market.

Adjusted profit came in at $2.12 per share in the three months ended Dec. 31, compared with Wall Street expectations of $2.10 per share.

Equifax, along with Experian and TransUnion , is one of the three largest consumer credit reporting agencies in the U.S.

The company sees 2025 revenue between $5.89 billion and $6.01 billion as mortgage credit inquiries in the U.S. missing analysts' expectation of $6.27 billion.

data.title: Sweden's Wästbygg Plans to Divest Project Development Operations
data.description:
Wästbygg (WBGR-B.ST, ) intends to sell the project development operations under its Residential business area to focus on its commercial buildings and logistics property projects.

The Swedish construction and project development company said Thursday it will immediately carry out the due diligence procedure and contract negotiations for the planned divestment.
